login.subtitle: Learning Mastery Support — bridge early gaps before they widen

student.subtitle: Your private study helper for this course. {{open}} topics to strengthen, {{done}} recovered so far.
student.recommendedHint: Grouped by topic, highest-risk first — start at the top.
student.nothing: Nothing to work on right now — you're on track. New activities appear here after assessments where you may benefit from review.
student.masteryNote: These mastery indicators are a private learning aid to help you focus your studying. They are not a grade and do not affect your course grade in any way — your grades are determined solely by your instructor through the official course assessments.
student.whyIntro: Recent assessment answers suggest this concept isn't fully solid yet. This short session uses retrieval practice and Socratic prompts to strengthen it before it affects later topics.
student.celebrateBody: You've strengthened {{names}}. Keep the momentum going.

tutor.intro: A live, one-on-one session with your AI tutor. Work through it — the tutor will let you know when you've got it. It guides; it won't hand you the answer.
tutor.placeholder: Tell me what you were thinking… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line)
tutor.complete: 🎉 Session complete — nice work. Your mastery of this topic has been updated.
tutor.planSteps: Spot the gap · talk it through · practice · quick mastery check
tutor.inputHint: No wrong answers here — just think out loud.
tutor.quickTitle: Not sure where to start? Try one:

demo.title: LMS Bridge demo
demo.note: Simulated {{lms}} interface (not affiliated with {{lms}}) — click the menu to look around; the LMS Bridge panel is the real, interactive tool.
demo.wakingUp: The demo backend is waking up or unavailable. Try again in a moment.
demo.simBanner: You're viewing a simulated {{lms}} course. Everything except the LMS Bridge content is a mock-up — the highlighted LMS Bridge part is the real, interactive tool.

copilot.title: AI Copilot — what to do before your next class

overview.noData: No mastery data yet. Run a sync.

clusters.title: Misconception clusters — teach the group, not the individual

students.assessmentResultsHint: — click a quiz/exam to see the student's answers
students.rosterTitle: Roster ({{count}}) — click a student to drill down
students.syncedMembers: Synced {{synced}} of {{members}} members from the LMS.

assessments.savedRecompute: Saved. Click “Recompute” to apply the change to mastery & remediation.
assessments.recomputed: Recomputed from enabled assessments — replayed {{results}} results, triggered {{modules}} new module(s).
assessments.importedFromLms: Imported {{n}} assessment(s) from the LMS gradebook.
assessments.emptyIntro: No assessments yet. They import automatically from your LMS gradebook the next time an instructor launches LMS Bridge from the course — or pull them now:
assessments.sourcesHelp: Toggle which assessments feed the adaptive engine. Disabled assessments are still recorded and shown here, but their feedback won't affect mastery or trigger remediation.

materials.uploadHelp: PDF, DOCX, Markdown or text. Extracted text grounds the AI remediation so activities use your course's notation, terminology, and examples. Tag a concept to target it.
materials.importTitle: Import course files from your LMS
materials.importHelp: Pull your course files in automatically from Canvas, Moodle, or Brightspace. The token is used once and not stored. Document files (PDF, DOCX, PPTX, TXT, MD, HTML, CSV) are imported and text-extracted to ground the AI.
materials.enterLmsFields: Enter the LMS URL, a token, and the course id.
materials.tokenCanvas: Canvas access token (Account → Settings → New Access Token)

setup.assessmentCreated: Assessment “{{title}}” created. Ingest results for it from the Brightspace sync or your LMS.
setup.conceptsHelp: Concepts are the learning objectives the adaptive engine tracks. Order them from foundational to advanced; prerequisites capture which concepts build on others.
setup.noConcepts: No concepts yet — add the first below.
setup.miscPlaceholder: e.g. Students forget to carry when a column sums to two.
setup.createAssessmentHelp: For a pilot you can define assessments here, then ingest results via the LMS sync or the results API. Quizzes/exams support per-question multiple-choice diagnosis.

remediation.title: Remediation ({{count}}) — grouped by {{group}}
remediation.clickToExpand: Click a {{group}} to expand, then a module to inspect its session.
